technical_plan.summary: React 18 + TypeScript SPA 前端，Python FastAPI REST API 后端，SQLite 数据库，JWT HS256 认证。前端 Vite 5 + React Router v6 + AuthContext 状态管理。后端分层架构 (router → service → models)，passlib bcrypt 密码哈希。合同状态流转 draft→active→terminated/expired。部署至 /projects/contract-mgmt-eval/ base path，Cache-Control: no-cache HTML 响应头。

status.T1: completed — 项目脚手架 (FastAPI + Vite + React 18 + TypeScript)
status.T2: completed — 数据库四表模型 (User/Contract/Attachment/AuditLog) + 种子数据
status.T3: completed — 认证 API (register/login/logout/me/password-reset) + JWT + bcrypt
status.T4: completed — 用户管理 API (admin CRUD + 权限守卫)
status.T5: completed — 合同管理 API (CRUD + 搜索/筛选/分页 + 状态流转 + 权限隔离)
status.T6: completed — 附件管理 API (上传/下载/预览/删除 + 格式校验 + 大小限制)
status.T7: completed — 前端框架 (React Router + AuthContext + Axios client + 全局组件)
status.T8: completed — 登录/注册/密码重置页面
status.T9: completed — 用户管理页面 (admin, 表格/搜索/分页/启用禁用)
status.T10: completed — 合同管理页面 (列表/详情/表单 + 状态流转操作)
status.T11: completed — 附件管理 UI (上传/列表/下载/预览/删除)
status.T12: completed — 前后端联调 (错误处理完善 + Cache-Control 中间件)
status.T13: completed — 自测脚本 (49 pytest tests, all passed)

implementation_commits: 11fc0ea feat(T1): scaffold project structure with FastAPI and React 18 + TypeScript
79fdc5e feat(T2): add SQLAlchemy models and seed data script
254825a feat(T3): implement auth endpoints (register/login/logout/me/password-reset) with JWT
0fcf2ee feat(T4): implement user management CRUD with admin role guard
5052a5b feat(T5): implement contract CRUD with search, pagination, and status flow
e0b53ec feat(T6): implement attachment upload/download/delete with format validation
351c157 feat(T7): build frontend framework with routing, auth context, and API client
e1bb158 feat(T8): implement login, register, and password reset pages
abff9ad feat(T9): implement user management pages (admin only)
68636f6 feat(T10): implement contract list, detail, and form pages with status flow
584024a feat(T11): add attachment upload/download/preview/delete in frontend UI
457457a feat(T12): integration polish — error cleanup, Cache-Control header

modules.test_auth.py: 14 tests — register, login, me, logout, password-reset, disabled user
modules.test_users.py: 10 tests — CRUD, permissions, search, status toggle
modules.test_contracts.py: 16 tests — CRUD, search/filter/pagination, status flow, isolation
modules.test_attachments.py: 9 tests — upload, download, preview, delete, validation, permissions
